title: Agent Chain Context Extension v0.1
description: Provider-neutral causal context bound to an AI execution receipt.

action_id.description: Stable identity or digest of the exact action envelope.

run_id.description: Identifier of the execution run containing this action.

parent_event_id.description: Immediate causal parent event, if one exists.

policy_decision_id.description: Decision or authorization record governing this action.

evidence_refs.description: Stable references to evidence used by the action or decision. Values must be lexicographically sorted before canonicalization.

purpose.description: Declared function for which the output or action was produced.

actor_id.description: Agent, human, service, or composite actor responsible for the action.

resource_scope.description: Workspace, tenant, repository, account, environment, or other bounded resource scope.
